desc.text: Solves the pain of tedious setups, distracted logging, and fragmented data tracking.

features.text: No More Complex Setups: Use building blocks to nest timers and reps. Set up complex routines in 30 seconds.
Flow Without Distraction: Custom metrics for weight & depth. Automated logs keep your focus on the hang.
Complete Growth Track: Integrated PR cards and trend charts. Data remains continuous across routines.

future.text: Future: Health (Apple/Google) and WH-C06 Bluetooth scale integration (Tindeq alternative).

desc.text: Hard to recall beta or explain movements? Create route maps manually to stay focused.

features.text: Manual hold marking for precise route mapping
Support for image export and instant sharing

future.text: Future: Considering AI hold recognition and cloud albums.

desc.text: Integrated real-time WH-C06 and Garmin heart rate broadcast (display only).
Enhanced training log mechanism, adding custom metric integration and automated logging.
Unrestricted structured editor, voice command optimization, and training calendar are now live.
Manual marking features released. Supports custom drawing and high-res exports.
Record WH-C06 and HR data into training logs for future advanced analysis.
Analyze climbing trajectory and center of gravity to improve precision.
Comprehensive database providing shoe sizing recommendations.
